Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional score of 95.2, demonstrating extraordinary long-term momentum across all time horizons—a 1,326% return over 10 years, 544% over 5 years, and 166% over the past year, all while maintaining price positions above its 30/50/100/200-day moving averages. The stock's outperformance versus SPY is striking at 1,088% over 10 years and 146% over 1 year, though its momentum_signal of 2.01 flags it as "overextended," suggesting the move may have run ahead of typical patterns. CLMT in second place shows a more volatile profile with an explosive 3-month acceleration (1,629x ratio from near-flat 1-month returns) and strong 5-year returns of 509%, but its 10-year return of only 148% and negative SPY outperformance over that period (-90%) reveal a recent re-acceleration rather than sustained secular strength. The data indicates LINC represents deeply entrenched long-term outperformance with moderate current overextension risk, while CLMT represents a newer momentum surge with a different historical character and incomplete long-term track record.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
